banner.earningTitle: Your Earning, XP, Currency, ranks, and cosmetics
banner.scriptoriumTitle: The Scriptorium. Long-form fiction by the people who live here

banner.scriptoriumInvites_other: {{count}} pending collaboration invites. Open the Scriptorium to act on them

banner.rulesTitle: The app rules and this server's own rules
banner.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions for this server

banner.globalAdminTitle: Global Admin: platform settings and cross-community oversight

writing.scriptoriumHint: Browse the library, read and write

roleplay.setMoodHint: Show a mood next to your name
roleplay.npcsOnHint: Enable NPC voice in this room
roleplay.npcsOffHint: Disable NPC voice in this room

forums.createHint: Apply to open your own forum
forums.newActivity: New activity since your last visit

rooms.findHint: Search for a room by name

myRooms.empty: No archived rooms yet. A room you own is archived once everyone leaves it, then shows up here so you can bring it back.
myRooms.recreatePrivateTitle: Recreate and join {{name}} (returns private with its original password)
myRooms.hideTitle: Remove {{name}} from this list, doesn't delete it; recreate any time with /go

people.messagesHint: DMs, friends, and friend requests, all in one place
people.ignoreListHint: Show or clear your ignore list

display.reduceMotionForcedHint: On because your device asks for it
display.reduceMotionHint: Soft fades; stops auto-playing motion. Helps if motion feels unwell
display.reduceCosmeticsUpstreamHint: On already from your motion or performance settings. Quiets name-style and avatar-border animations
display.reduceCosmeticsHint: Quiets name-style and avatar-border animations for smoother, lighter chat
display.slowModeHint: Real-time userlist + typing paused; resyncs on a schedule
display.refreshHint: Refresh once, or slow real-time updates to ease load on this device

account.earningHint: Wallet, ranks, shop, items, collection, pets
account.exportHint: Download your profile, characters, worlds, and stories

toolMenu.arcadeTitle: Play the arcade's games, like the Eidolon Tamer
toolMenu.tourTitle: Replay the guided walkthrough of the chat and its rails
toolMenu.helpTitle: Browse the guides and every command

export.success: Your data export downloaded — keep it somewhere safe.
export.failure: Couldn't build your export just now. Try again in a minute.

identity.noOthers: No other characters on this account.
identity.noneYet: No characters yet, create one below.
identity.createTitle: Create a new character and start setting it up
identity.leaveTitle: Drop the active character and return to your master (OOC) account.
identity.incognitoGoTitle: Disappear from userlists and observe rooms unseen. Mod/admin only.
identity.incognitoLeaveTitle: Reveal yourself, the room sees you join again.
identity.switchTitleInCharacter: Switch character or return to OOC

refresh.description: Pauses the real-time userlist + typing churn and resyncs on this schedule — eases load on a slower device. Chat messages stay live.

language.description: Applies right away, no reload needed. System default follows your device's language.

infoModal.escHint: Press <1>Esc</1> or click outside to close.

richEditor.linkPrompt: Link URL (https://…). Leave blank to remove.
richEditor.noteTitle: Insert a margin note, visible to collaborators in drafts; stripped on publish

rating.nsfwTitle: Adults only. Members under 18 cannot see this.

preview.caption: · preview
preview.sampleSystem: * Topic set: Welcome to The Spire.

itemZoom.closeHint: Tap anywhere or press Esc to close

createRoom.title: Create a room
createRoom.intro: Pick a name. Spaces become underscores, so <1>Oak Tavern</1> becomes <3>Oak_Tavern</3>.
createRoom.errorNameInvalid: Names can use letters, numbers, and _ - ' (up to 40 characters).
createRoom.errorPasswordRequired: A private room needs a password.

theater.noVideoQueued: No video queued. Add one with <1>/theater add <url></1>, or stream your own with <3>/theater live <url></3>.
theater.hostNotQueued: The host hasn't queued a video yet.
theater.streamHelpTitle: How to stream your own video (VLC / OBS + a tunnel)

nameTag.oocTitle: Speaking from their master / OOC account, not as a character

errorBoundary.body: The app hit an unexpected error. Reloading usually fixes it.

linkPreview.removeTitle: Remove this preview for everyone (the link stays in your message)

marquee.dismissTitle: Hide announcements for 24 hours (or until an admin edits them). Bring them back sooner from the Room Info bar.

visitors.description: Distinct visitors counted with one-per-day dedupe. Members are signed-in viewers; external counts anonymous traffic.
visitors.showToggle: Show the visitors counter on my public profile.
visitors.purchase: Purchase the <1>Profile Visitor Counter</1> Flair to track and display visitor counts.

marquee.description: Up to {{max}} short quotes ({{maxLen}} characters each) that rotate on your profile every ~8 seconds. Markdown supported.
marquee.purchase: Purchase the <1>Profile Quote Marquee</1> Flair to add rotating quotes to your profile.

visitorToggle.show: Show the visitor counter on my public profile.
visitorToggle.note: When off, only you see the member / external breakdown in Edit Profile → Flair.
